Hub Home > human-resources > Performance Review Cycle Automation

Performance Review Cycle Automation

Design an end-to-end performance review workflow: self-assessment prompts, manager evaluation templates, 360-feedback question sets, calibration discussion guides, and development plan generators — all customized to your company values and competency framework.

Expert MULTI-STEP WORKFLOW Time-saving
Pro tip

Feed in your company values document and competency matrix. The agentic approach generates interconnected artifacts that reference the same competencies throughout, ensuring consistency across self-review, manager review, and development plans.

performance review feedback 360 development plan hr automation

Prompt Variants by Model

Claude Claude 4.x
FRESH APR 2026 
You are an organizational development consultant specializing in performance management for growing companies. Design a complete performance review system for [COMPANY_NAME] ([INDUSTRY], [TEAM_SIZE]...
You are an organizational development consultant specializing in performance management for growing companies. Design a complete performance review system for [COMPANY_NAME] ([INDUSTRY], [TEAM_SIZE]...

Unlock this prompt + all 74 in the library — free, updated monthly, zero spam.

Your email unlocks all 74 prompts instantly. No password, no signup — just your email. 

You are an organizational development consultant specializing in performance management for growing companies. Design a complete performance review system for [COMPANY_NAME] ([INDUSTRY], [TEAM_SIZE] employees).

<company_framework>
Company values: [LIST 3-5 VALUES]
Core competencies: [LIST KEY COMPETENCIES OR DESCRIBE WHAT GREAT LOOKS LIKE]
Review cadence: [ANNUAL / SEMI-ANNUAL / QUARTERLY]
Current process: [DESCRIBE WHAT EXISTS — even if it is "nothing formal"]
</company_framework>

Design these interconnected artifacts:

**1. Self-Assessment Template:**
- 5-7 reflection questions tied to your competencies and values
- Accomplishment documentation format (situation, action, result)
- Growth area identification with self-rating scale
- Forward-looking goal-setting section

**2. Manager Evaluation Template:**
- Rating rubric per competency (1-5 scale with behavioral anchors for each level)
- Accomplishment acknowledgment section
- Growth area assessment with specific examples required
- Recommended development actions
- Promotion readiness indicator

**3. 360-Feedback Questionnaire:**
- 10-12 questions covering collaboration, communication, leadership, and values alignment
- Mix of Likert scale (1-5) and open-ended questions
- Anonymous-friendly design

**4. Calibration Discussion Guide:**
- How to facilitate a calibration session across managers
- Rating distribution framework
- Bias check questions
- Conflict resolution protocol

**5. Individual Development Plan (IDP) Template:**
- Linked to review outcomes
- 3-month, 6-month, and 12-month goals
- Development actions (training, stretch assignments, mentoring)
- Success metrics
- Manager and employee signatures

All artifacts must reference the same competencies and values for consistency throughout the cycle.
Notes: Flagship Claude use case — complex, interconnected document generation. Use Projects to store your values/competency framework.

Act as an organizational development expert. Build a complete performance review system for [COMPANY_NAME] ([INDUSTRY], [TEAM_SIZE] employees).

**Our Framework:**
- Values: [LIST 3-5]

Unlock this prompt + all 74 in the library — free, updated monthly, zero spam.

Your email unlocks all 74 prompts instantly. No password, no signup — just your email. 

Act as an organizational development expert. Build a complete performance review system for [COMPANY_NAME] ([INDUSTRY], [TEAM_SIZE] employees).

**Our Framework:**
- Values: [LIST 3-5]
- Competencies: [LIST OR DESCRIBE]
- Review cycle: [ANNUAL/SEMI-ANNUAL/QUARTERLY]
- Current process: [DESCRIBE]

**Create all of these, ensuring they reference the same competencies throughout:**

**1. Self-Assessment Template:**
- 5-7 reflection questions tied to our competencies
- Accomplishment log (Situation-Action-Result format)
- Self-rating per competency
- Goal-setting section

**2. Manager Evaluation Template:**
- 1-5 rating rubric with behavioral anchors per competency
- Accomplishment recognition
- Growth areas with required examples
- Development recommendations
- Promotion readiness flag

**3. 360-Feedback Survey:**
- 10-12 questions (Likert + open-ended)
- Covers collaboration, communication, leadership, values
- Designed for anonymity

**4. Calibration Session Guide:**
- Facilitation instructions
- Rating distribution framework
- Bias check prompts
- Conflict resolution steps

**5. Development Plan Template:**
- Linked to review results
- 3/6/12-month goals
- Actions: training, stretch projects, mentoring
- Success metrics
Notes: Produces a LOT of content — expect to click "continue generating." A Custom GPT with your values pre-loaded ensures consistency.

**Our foundation:**
- Values: [LIST 3-5]
- What good performance looks like: [DESCRIBE...

Unlock this prompt + all 74 in the library — free, updated monthly, zero spam.

Your email unlocks all 74 prompts instantly. No password, no signup — just your email. 

I need a complete performance review system for my [INDUSTRY] company, [COMPANY_NAME] ([TEAM_SIZE] employees).

**Our foundation:**
- Values: [LIST 3-5]
- What good performance looks like: [DESCRIBE COMPETENCIES]
- How often we review: [CADENCE]
- What we do now: [DESCRIBE CURRENT PROCESS]

**Please create 5 connected templates, all referencing the same competencies:**

1. **Self-assessment:** 5-7 reflection questions, accomplishment log (situation-action-result), self-ratings, and goals
2. **Manager evaluation:** Rating rubric (1-5 with descriptions per level per competency), accomplishment recognition, growth areas with examples, development actions, promotion readiness
3. **360-feedback survey:** 10-12 questions mixing ratings and open-ended, covering teamwork, communication, leadership, and values
4. **Calibration guide:** How to run a calibration meeting, distribution guidance, bias checks, disagreement resolution
5. **Development plan:** Tied to review outcomes, 3/6/12-month goals, training and stretch assignments, success metrics

Make sure all 5 documents use consistent language and reference the same competency framework.
Notes: Gemini in Google Workspace can generate these as individual Google Docs in a shared folder.
Copilot Copilot (Microsoft 365)
FRESH APR 2026 
I want to set up a proper performance review process for my [INDUSTRY] company, [COMPANY_NAME] ([TEAM_SIZE] employees).

**What we care about:**
- Our values: [LIST 3-5]
- What great performance...
I want to set up a proper performance review process for my [INDUSTRY] company, [COMPANY_NAME] ([TEAM_SIZE] employees).

**What we care about:**
- Our values: [LIST 3-5]
- What great performance...

Unlock this prompt + all 74 in the library — free, updated monthly, zero spam.

Your email unlocks all 74 prompts instantly. No password, no signup — just your email. 

I want to set up a proper performance review process for my [INDUSTRY] company, [COMPANY_NAME] ([TEAM_SIZE] employees).

**What we care about:**
- Our values: [LIST 3-5]
- What great performance looks like: [DESCRIBE]
- How often we want to do reviews: [CADENCE]
- What we do today: [DESCRIBE]

**Please create these 5 templates (make sure they all use the same competencies):**

1. **Self-assessment form:** Reflection questions about their performance, a place to list accomplishments, self-ratings, and goals for next period.

2. **Manager review form:** A rating scale (1-5 with clear descriptions for each level), space to recognize good work, areas to improve with specific examples, what to work on next, and whether they are ready for promotion.

3. **360-feedback survey:** 10-12 questions from coworkers about teamwork, communication, leadership, and living our values. Mix of rating scales and written answers.

4. **Calibration meeting guide:** How to run a meeting where managers compare ratings, make sure they are fair, check for bias, and resolve disagreements.

5. **Growth plan:** Connected to the review results. Goals for 3, 6, and 12 months. Training, projects, and mentoring. How to measure progress.
Notes: Copilot in Word can create each template as a separate .docx. Copilot in Forms can build the 360-feedback survey as a Microsoft Form.
